# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The following versions of this project are currently being supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0.x | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

If you discover a security vulnerability within this project, please send an email to [pc.curtincolombo@gmail.com](mailto:pc.curtincolombo@gmail.com). All security vulnerabilities will be promptly addressed.

To help us resolve the issue quickly, please include as much information as possible:
- Type of issue (e.g., buffer overflow, SQL injection, cross-site scripting)
- Full steps to reproduce the vulnerability
- Any proof-of-concept code
- Impact of the vulnerability

## Our Commitment
We will acknowledge receipt of your vulnerability report within 48 hours and send you a status update every 7 days until the issue is resolved or a fix is released.
